content:

```json
	{"bbox_2d": [68, 136, 155, 149], "text_content": "1.Specific applications:"},
	{"bbox_2d": [68, 153, 893, 180], "text_content": "Consumer Equipment: Products that can be used in consumer equipment such as home appliances, audio/visual equipment, communication equipment, information equipment, office equipment, and household robotics, and whose functions are not directly related to the protection of human life and property."},
	{"bbox_2d": [68, 198, 755, 225], "text_content": "Industrial Equipment: Products that can be used in industrial equipment such as base stations, manufacturing equipment, industrial robotics equipment, and measurement equipment, and whose functions do not directly relate to the protection of human life and property."},
	{"bbox_2d": [68, 243, 806, 288], "text_content": "Medial Equipment [GHTF A/B/C] except for Implant Equipment: Products suitable for use in medical devices designated under the GHTF international classifications as Class A or Class B (the functions of which are not directly involved in protection of human life or property) or in medical devices other than implants designated under the GHTF international classifications as Class C (the malfunctioning of which is considered to pose a comparatively high risk to the human body)."},
	{"bbox_2d": [68, 306, 921, 333], "text_content": "Automotive Infotainment/Comfort Equipment: Products that can be used for automotive equipment such as car navigation systems and car audio systems that do not directly relate to human life and whose structure, equipment, and performance are not specifically required by law to meet technical standards for safety assurance or environmental protection."},
	{"bbox_2d": [68, 352, 161, 364], "text_content": "*Only for Mobile devices"},
	{"bbox_2d": [68, 368, 647, 395], "text_content": "These MLCC products are designed for use in devices with a typical lifetime of less than 5 years.\n(Examples: Cellular phone, Smartphone, Tablet PC, Digital camera, Watch, Electronics dictionary, Small-scale server, IPC-9592B class1 equipment, etc.)"},
	{"bbox_2d": [68, 413, 693, 426], "text_content": "2.Unsuitable Application: Applications listed in \"Limitation of applications\" in this specification."},
	{"bbox_2d": [68, 430, 967, 456], "text_content": "WE DISCLAIM ANY LOSS AND DAMAGES ARISING FROM OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE PRODUCTS INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE CASE SUCH LOSS AND DAMAGES CAUSED BY THE UNEXPECTED ACCIDENT, IN EVENT THAT THE PRODUCT IS APPLIED FOR THE PURPOSE WHICH IS SPECIFIED ABOVE AS THE UNSUITABLE APPLICATION FOR THE PRODUCT."},
	{"bbox_2d": [21, 963, 145, 976], "text_content": "GRM21BR71C105KA01-01A"},
	{"bbox_2d": [495, 963, 501, 976], "text_content": "1"}
]
```
